title: Vendor in latest containers/common
body:
Signed-off-by: Toshiki Sonoda <sonoda.toshiki@fujitsu.com>

#17463 contains changes to common/libimage.
Need to update common package.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

## system test: Adapt to image pull/load events chenges

`image events` and `events with events_logfile_path in containers.conf` are failed.
This issue related to containers/common#1325

<details>
<summary>NG log</summary>

```
not ok 1 events with events_logfile_path in containers.conf
# (from function `assert' in file helpers.bash, line 643,
#  in test file test.bats, line 17)
#   `assert "$(< $events_file)" =~ "\"Name\":\"$IMAGE\"" "Image found in events"' failed
# # podman rm -t 0 --all --force --ignore
# # podman ps --all --external --format {{.ID}} {{.Names}}
# # podman images --all --format {{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}} {{.ID}}
# quay.io/libpod/testimage:20221018 f5a99120db64
# # podman --events-backend=file pull quay.io/libpod/testimage:20221018
# Trying to pull quay.io/libpod/testimage:20221018...
# Getting image source signatures
# Copying blob sha256:a3ed95caeb02ffe68cdd9fd84406680ae93d633cb16422d00e8a7c22955b46d4
# Copying blob sha256:578f06cc66c59303d36e0c83b8c7fd9b2da35cca97118700cb4a373677c01dca
# Copying config sha256:f5a99120db6452661930a1db3bf7390eec9b963f5f62c068fa32dc1d550afad3
# Writing manifest to image destination
# Storing signatures
# f5a99120db6452661930a1db3bf7390eec9b963f5f62c068fa32dc1d550afad3
# #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
# #|     FAIL: Image found in events
# #| expected: =~ '"Name":"quay.io/libpod/testimage:20221018"'
# #|   actual:    '{"ID":"f5a99120db6452661930a1db3bf7390eec9b963f5f62c068fa32dc1d550afad3","Name":"f5a99120db6452661930a1db3bf7390eec9b963f5f62c068fa32dc1d550afad3","Status":"pull","Time":"2023-02-17T15:43:24.219814576+09:00","Type":"image","Attributes":null}'
# #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
# # [teardown]
# # podman pod rm -t 0 --all --force --ignore
# # podman rm -t 0 --all --force --ignore
# # podman network prune --force
# # podman volume rm -a -f
```
</details>

The name field of the image pull event is ID instead of Name.
(`quay.io/libpod/testimage:20221018` -> `f5a99120db6452661930a1db3bf7390eec9b963f5f62c068fa32dc1d550afad3`)
Is this change expected?

PR needs rebase.

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
#17591 brought in a newer containers-common (852ca05a1fbb)  so I believe this PR can be closed.
